channel.title: GitHub Lua Weekly Trending
channel.description: Weekly Trending of Lua in GitHub

item.title: LazyVim/LazyVim
item.description: Neovim config for the lazy

item.title: Saghen/blink.cmp
item.description: Performant, batteries-included completion plugin for Neovim

item.title: neovim/nvim-lspconfig
item.description: Quickstart configs for Nvim LSP

item.title: yetone/avante.nvim
item.description: Use your Neovim like using Cursor AI IDE!

item.title: xmake-io/xmake
item.description: 🔥 A cross-platform build utility based on Lua

item.title: stevearc/oil.nvim
item.description: Neovim file explorer: edit your filesystem like a buffer

item.title: folke/lazy.nvim
item.description: 💤 A modern plugin manager for Neovim

item.title: nvim-lua/kickstart.nvim
item.description: A launch point for your personal nvim configuration

item.title: folke/which-key.nvim
item.description: 💥 Create key bindings that stick. WhichKey helps you remember your Neovim keymaps, by showing available keybindings in a popup as you type.

item.title: folke/tokyonight.nvim
item.description: 🏙 A clean, dark Neovim theme written in Lua, with support for lsp, treesitter and lots of plugins. Includes additional themes for Kitty, Alacritty, iTerm and Fish.

item.title: zbirenbaum/copilot.lua
item.description: Fully featured & enhanced replacement for copilot.vim complete with API for interacting with Github Copilot

item.title: folke/noice.nvim
item.description: 💥 Highly experimental plugin that completely replaces the UI for messages, cmdline and the popupmenu.

item.title: echasnovski/mini.nvim
item.description: Library of 40+ independent Lua modules improving overall Neovim (version 0.8 and higher) experience with minimal effort

item.title: nvim-tree/nvim-web-devicons
item.description: Provides Nerd Font icons (glyphs) for use by neovim plugins

item.title: nvim-telescope/telescope.nvim
item.description: Find, Filter, Preview, Pick. All lua, all the time.

item.title: nvimtools/none-ls.nvim
item.description: null-ls.nvim reloaded / Use Neovim as a language server to inject LSP diagnostics, code actions, and more via Lua.

item.title: epwalsh/obsidian.nvim
item.description: Obsidian 🤝 Neovim

item.title: OXY2DEV/markview.nvim
item.description: ☄️ Highly customisable markdown(latex & inline html) previewer for Neovim

item.title: andrewferrier/debugprint.nvim
item.description: Debugging in NeoVim the print() way!

item.title: rafamadriz/friendly-snippets
item.description: Set of preconfigured snippets for different languages.

item.title: hrsh7th/nvim-cmp
item.description: A completion plugin for neovim coded in Lua.
